scope: TDD RED phase — single failing test for counter increment behavior
test_added: increments assistantOutputCount on multiple hook calls

evidence.failure_reason: handleTextComplete always calls initSession (creates fresh session) — never loads existing session or calls incrementCounter. Second call overwrites first.

blockers_for_green: handleTextComplete must detect existing session and load it instead of creating new
handleTextComplete must call incrementCounter for assistantOutputCount
handleTextComplete must use addTurn on existing session (not overwrite)
recommended_next_action: Refactor handleTextComplete to: (1) check if session file already exists for input.sessionID, (2) load existing session if present, (3) call incrementCounter for assistantOutputCount
